headline: Monster Beverage Reshapes Leadership To Support Regional Growth And Investor Focus
summary: Monster Beverage (NasdaqGS:MNST) has announced a major refresh of its executive leadership structure. Rob Gehring has been appointed CEO Americas, Guy Carling CEO EMEA & OSP, and Emelie Tirre Chief Strategy Officer. The changes are aimed at sharpening regional execution and companywide strategy across global markets. For investors watching Monster Beverage at a share price of $75.61, this shake up in the top ranks comes after a mixed shorter term share performance, with a 7.2% decline over...
